subject: [PATCH v3 1/8] io_uring/kbuf: add support for kernel-managed buffer rings

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the performance implications of kernel-managed buffer rings and suggested that the feature should be carefully benchmarked before merging.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series introduces kernel-managed buffer rings for io_uring, allowing the kernel to allocate and manage backing buffers instead of relying on application-provided buffers. The feature is enabled through a new flag in the pbuf interface and requires the caller to set the IOU_PBUF_RING_MMAP flag when creating a kernel-managed buffer ring.
